text.title: template-task Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for template-task as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Vague acceptance criteria: "system works correctly" or "user experience is smooth".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Executor agents cannot verify vague criteria. Every AC must have an observable, code-verifiable outcome.

failure-mode.description: Given-When-Then format used for background jobs (no "when" actor).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use "Given / Triggered by / Then" variant for jobs with no user actor.

failure-mode.description: Estimated Tokens for test files set to <10k.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Test files for Django viewsets or React components consistently run 30-40k tokens. Underestimating causes executor to run out of context before tests are complete.

failure-mode.description: Estimated Tokens field is advisory; executors often exceed it without enforcement.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Task files have no hard token limit enforced by the framework itself — context overflow happens at execution time.

failure-mode.description: Implementation and Summary sections are filled after execution — they are empty when task is dispatched, defeating their purpose as context for the executor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These sections capture execution results, not pre-execution context. They cannot be filled until the task is done.

failure-mode.description: Token estimation guide in template is Django/React-centric; other stacks have different baselines.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add stack-specific calibration to the token budget section for your tech stack.

failure-mode.description: Task states (todo → in-progress → done) are file-system directory states, not fields — template section is ambiguous.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The Status field in the task header and the directory must stay in sync manually; consider a hook to validate this.

failure-mode.description: No field for "rollback" — when a task must be undone, there is no documented reversal procedure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a "Rollback" section for tasks that modify stable data or deployed services.
